review_text: Right on the beach and only a short stroll to the main street. Plenty of washing machines, entertainment room for the children also a huge camp kitchen. Clean and tidy amenities. Will accommodate all size vans.

We had a great stay at NRMA Phillip Island in a Safari Tent. Beachfront location, clean and had everything we needed. We stayed during cooler months but the tent was very warm and cost. Staff at the park were helpful, and the kids enjoyed the onsite playground. Would highly recommend.
We love coming here the safari tent ⛺️ is amazing. We've come here 2 years in a row for mothers day its becoming a tradition. Were enjoy being near the water water. The facilities are great too.
The location was good but the cleanness of room was not good.mould in bathroom and windows , dusty floors and staff terrible to address any issues.

Great park on the foreshore. We stayed on Premium Powered site 185 with a great view across the Bass. Facilities were always clean & tidy, plus a comfortable camp kitchen for those rainy times. Kids will love the big fluffy bunnies feeding on the lawns at night 🐇
Lovely clean and tidy facilities, wonderful location on the beach and hardly any traffic noise at night from outside of park. Friendly staff. Extremely happy to return again and again.

Cabines propres.
Un manque évident de vaisselle dans la cuisine. Ni poêle ni casserole... Tout est à revoir à ce niveau.
Dommage car l'emplacement est parfait et le camping dans un bon état général.

Great location, really convenient. The room was alright, though I did notice a bit of hair on the benchtop when I checked in. The bunk bed is probably better for kids—it’s a bit awkward for adults to get up.

The blanket had a slight smell and a few stains, but I guess being in a camping-style place you can’t expect too much, so it was fine.

Shower and kitchen were both good, and it’s handy being able to cook your own food. Check-in was easy, and the service was great. Thanks to Suzi for the chocolate, really appreciated it.

Location is excellent
Staff are great
Bed in ibis room 86 was far to.soft
Dipped in the middle
Had a lovely 7 days Stan at nrma foreshore caravan park Cowes office staff where so friendly such a great park
The best place ever

We had a fabulous stay in our motorhome - synthetic grass site with water views straight down the grassed area passed playground. Close to well provisioned bathrooms.
Groundsman was very pleasant and helpful. Didn’t have much to do with office staff as all booking done on line.
Would stay again.
stayed the preiously, in the same cabin
Beautiful location and very clean park the staff was very friendly

The place is lovely, got heaps for everyone to do. The camp kitchen was great to use for our group. Loved being close to the beach.  Cabin's could do with a bit of an update. Still very clean and has all that you need. Will be back again.

Loved the entire Safari Tent on the beachfront experience.  The Tents were so beautifully decked out with excellent attention to detail and the proximity to the water was so relaxing I slept so well with the sound of the sea in the background.  Loved it!!

The room is old and poorly maintained. The window screen is torn. The bed was dirty and unmade, so I had to make it myself. The floor squeaks when you walk on it. The bathroom looked like it hadn't been cleaned at all, as there was still hair left from the previous guest.

Warm welcome and a quick check in. Everything was explained helpfully.

The chalet was big enough and clean and comfortable. The basic catering amenities were good. Nice bathroom.

Parking outside the chalet with the beach 200m away. Nice and quiet.

Highly recommend.

Our Australian hosts, who’ve stayed in caravan parks all over the country, said this was the nicest one they’d ever stayed at. There was an onsite maintenance man who was attentive to requests. The staff was very friendly. The public cooking and eating areas were clean and well maintained. The kids loved the beach.

That said, for someone who’d never stayed in a caravan park before, the units were a little rough around the edges, walls thin and flimsy, and free wifi so slow an unreliable as to effectively be unusable most of the time.

It’s all a matter of perspective, I suppose.
Ensuites are fantastic

A lovely place let down by avoidable issues
I genuinely wanted to love this stay — and in many ways, the property itself gave me every reason to. Great location, beautiful surroundings, and kudos for having an EV charger. These things matter and deserve recognition.
But after two nights, I left frustrated by a series of issues that shouldn’t exist at a property of this quality.
Misleading booking information. I booked the Queen Studio through Agoda, and what I arrived to was not what was advertised. The photos don’t accurately represent the room, and calling it a “Queen” studio when it contains a double bed is, frankly, deceptive. I would not have booked had I known. Guests deserve accurate information — it’s a basic expectation.
After-hours key security is a concern. Arriving late, I self-checked in and found my envelope — containing my room key and the gate access code — sitting in an unlocked wooden box outside. When I raised this the following day, the explanation given was twofold: the lock was removed because it confused guests, and the after-hours manager was tired of being called out to assist. I appreciate honesty, but I’d gently suggest that staff convenience should never come at the cost of guest security. Removing a lock so the phone stops ringing is not a solution — it’s a trade-off that leaves guests sleeping in rooms where the keys were left completely unsecured. This needs to be properly addressed.
WiFi was non-functional. Listed as a free inclusion, the WiFi didn’t connect to the internet on my first night — confirmed across both my laptop and phone. I texted the after-hours number and received no response, then called and left a voicemail. Nobody called back. Not that night, not the next morning — nothing. For a paying guest with a legitimate issue, complete silence is not acceptable. The following day the WiFi worked, but was extremely slow. For anyone needing to work remotely, this is a real issue.
Room privacy and comfort gaps. The window blind only offers privacy when fully closed — natural light and privacy are mutually exclusive, which isn’t a great trade-off. There’s also only one chair for two guests. Small detail, but sharing breakfast sitting on the bed isn’t the relaxing morning experience you hope for.
The bones of this property are genuinely excellent, and I do hope management takes this feedback in the spirit it’s intended — not as a complaint, but as an opportunity. However, I’ll be honest: before writing this, I read through a number of previous reviews and noticed many warm, well-worded responses promising to improve. One reviewer specifically raised the exact same issue I experienced — that the photos online don’t match the room you actually receive. That was some time ago, and nothing has changed. Good responses to reviews are appreciated, but they mean nothing if the issues aren’t actually fixed. Words without action are just words.

Place is nice, but staff are not very helpful and they don’t really go beyond, just the minimum.
The park itself is nice. And the rooms were nice.
If service is important, consider it might be an issue, but if not, great place to stay.
Should also mention. I connected to WiFi no problem but no internet at all. Tried again and again. Then tried texting the after hours number. Heard nothing. Then tried calling, no answer, just a computer voice asking for my name but still not connecting. Care factor, zero.
I also rather not be identified. I appreciate they would like to contact me, but to what end. What is done is done.

The park is way to cramped in and was very uncomfortable. Trying to hard to get as many people in as possible and not considering the comfort of guests. People were camping on top of each other and the spots are really hard to get into with a van as the roads are really thin and unless you have no one camped across from you it's almost impossible to get in. Beautiful location and lovely views of the beach that's about it.

Really nice park. Showers are good. Amenities are clean and have everything you need as a camper.
Its right on the beach which makes it easy to watch sunrise/sunset 😁😀
Great location and close by the shops.
My only complaint was the family cooking dinner late playing loud music :/

This was close to a perfect stay! I can’t fault much.. the tent was Devine! Location was perfect! It was picture perfect the entire stay! The only thing I would say is the beds in safari tent 1 were extremely uncomfortable and felt like rock hard with a hint of springs! But apart from that I’ll be taking my son to this place time and time again! The staff also were soooooo nice! This was a great little one night getaway for me and my toddler

We enjoyed five nights in two sheerwater cabins with our daughter, son in law and granddaughter. Cabins were immaculately clean and well appointed. Staff were friendly and couldn't be more helpful and the general vibe was very laid back.|We enjoyed the fabulous amenities including recreation room, barbecues and camp kitchen. Beachside location and proximity to town and major attractions made this an ideal base for a family holiday.

We booked in here for three nights.  The arrival was handled pleasantly and the staff members encountered were friendly and courteous and our villa position was shown on the park map.  It was clean, well presented and well set out.  There was sufficient crockery, cutlery etc. for use.  There were sufficient towels etc.  We enjoyed our stay and as we were very close to the shopping centre, it was easy to pop up for shopping, food etc. Overall, we would stay here again.
Stayed in one of the cabins

The NRMA Holiday park was really good, it was close to everything including the town, close to the beach too. Something that was amazing was how clean the bathrooms were really happy had a wonderful time.
Was great for me had all the amenities I needed will be coming back next time great location not far from shops and beach highly recommend....

3 nights powered site , A little tight for a larger van , Friendly staff and clean amenities, Dog friendly and on the beach ,
Handy walk to town ,
Unfortunately a couple of School groups didn’t help with our experience,

First of all - the staff at the reception was super nice and helpful. However, if it would not have been for one night only, we would have left and stayed somewhere else. We booked an Ibis Cabin - pet friendly, as the regular one was already fully booked. We assumed that the Layout would be the same, but it was not. I am very sure that there were no photos of the bunk bed part of the cabin during the booking, as I would not have booked the cabin then. The bunk bed is in the same room as the sink for the bathroom and you have to walk through the bunk bed room to get to the toilet/shower. Unfortunately, my 62 year old mother had to sleep in a bunk bed with super thin mattresses and a miserable condition. Furthermore, we woke her up in the middle of the night as we had to use the toilet. Overall the cabin was not clean (there was a fork laying on the wardrobe, which shows that they are not being cleaned regularly) and run down and we just did not feel comfortable staying there.

Park is excellent, always activities for the kids during school holiday, live music, celebrations for new years and australia day and a very strong sense of community. You can't beat the location, right on the beach along with the fantastic owners, who put so much time and effort into making this a 5 star park!
Sehr sauberer Platz. Die Angestellten sind immer sm reinigen. Unser Ensuite sehr sauber & Modern. Der Zugang zum Beach sehr schön. Vielen Dank für euren Einsatz. Empfehlen wir gerne weiter.
Very nice

My husband and I love holidaying here since 2019. The cabins suites we stayed at were awesome especially pelican suite which had a great view of the beach. But now they have the safaritents infront of the cabins which has closer view of the beach. My husband and I stayed twice in safaritent 1. The location of the accommodations is awesome too because it's just a 2 minute drive to Coles, other shops and restaurants. My husband and I recommend everyone to holiday here even for any occasion of celebration like a honeymoon.

We have stayed here many times, mainly before NRMA took over.  I will start by saying a big thank you to Kelly who followed through with her promise to call my wife if a cancellation came in, so late on Friday we were off to Phillip Island.

The park is in a good location in Cowes.  The cabin was clean.  I think it was an older cabin that had been modernised but we were very happy there for our stay.  We were well looked after and notified by text that an ice cream man was on the beach and it is a very nice park.  The laundry was clean and modern as I had a sticky beak when walking back from the beach.

They have electric bikes you can hire which are half the price in you are a NRMA member.  These are great fun and my son and I bombed into Cowes on them before swapping so my wife and daughter could take their turn.

Lots of fun, right on the beach as well.  We will be back and thank you for having us.

Great location and a very well-maintained property. The Ibis cabin was clean and tidy, with parking right in front, though it is starting to show its age. The only downside was the Wi-Fi, which unfortunately wasn’t working. Overall a great stay.
Lovely looking park but they don't do unpowered sites.
Wonderful time with our dog,the beach added that extra warmth of experience for our dog. The site is missing a few extra services which could improve the overall experience, overall was good.

We had the most amazing stay at the NRMA Phillip Island Beachfront Holioday Park.

We stayed over the Aus Day long weekend and were so happy. The staff was great, there were great activitations such as pancake breakfasts and a tennasse bbq food truck, ice cream trucks etc. Room was clean, a bit small but that's what we booked. Staff was super helpful and it was just really a well run establishment. Loved it and will  be back.

Stayed in safari tent which was cosy and clean. Stunning view of beach. Beautiful sunset. Comfortable bed. Cute little fireplace. We had storms whilst there which was fun, the tent was flapping and we felt safe and quite liked it. There is a kettle, fridge, microwave and outdoor BBQ. Stayed for 2 nights and wish we had of booked longer. Will definitely be back for a longer stay as very peaceful.
Bad mattress. Not clean, block sink. Dirty shower. Bad WIFI, bathroom door would no lock. Location great. Very friendly reception.

Stayed in the Ibis dog friendly cabin. Overall, this is a lovely campsite, close to the beach, great amenities and central location.

The one bedroom cabin was a little older but suited our needs and was very clean. The enclosed balcony is really great with a dog. Has everything you might need amenities wise.

Beware that there are rabbits everywhere so consider this if you’re bringing your doggo (ours was locked on to them!) Also, this time of year (Dec) there are considerable restrictions on dogs on beaches around Cowes including the beach this park backs onto. I would recommend checking the Phillip Island council website if you’re looking at going in summer as it can be a little restricting on what/where you can go.
Sehr liebes Team, gute Kabinen. Sehr sauber. Man ist direkt am Strand und es gibt auch einen tollen Gesellschaftsraum z.B. mit Tischtennisplatte. Waschen ist vor Ort auch möglich. Sehr zu empfehlen.

We enjoyed our stay here. Our cabin is very spacious and they provide kitchen in our room. So easy to prepare simple cooking for my kids. And they provide all the utensils too. Can have access to the beach and have small playground in their compound

Neat, clean and tidy cabin, very close to Penguin parade.
Excellent service.

Its convenient for town and the beach.
The room (Ibis Cabin) was quite dated and could do with redecorating and a good deep clean.
Small but, ok for the money.
Great park! Love the beach access for the dogs morning walks!!
Stayed 4 nights on a powered site, no trouble getting on our site, close to amenities and beach less than 100 metres away. All the normal major food stores close by.

It’s a nice place to stay a night if you are driving over to this island to see penguin parade . This place is more popular to motor home stopover. |The room is cozy and the bed have heater which is good for us in the mid of spring where the temperature is still chilling. Get ur food supply from nearby Coles or Woolsworths and cook at the cabin with the microwave oven available in the cabin. |The is no usb outlet. WiFi is ok in the room. There are a lot cute rabbits hopping around the compound. |Check in n check out were easy.
Super clean campground with great amenities (loved the pizza oven!) and friendly staff. Highly recommend!

Stayed one night mainly to visit the Penguin Parade.

We booked the Ibis cabin. The space was small but had almost everything we needed for a short stay. However, the cabin was quite dated, especially the bathroom, and the stove was not working during our stay.

Staff were friendly and efficient at check-in. For a simple overnight stop, it did the job, but do not expect anything modern or polished.

The room was clean and had a kitchen. The accommodation itself is quite interesting; they have a game room and a great location right by the sea. It looks like there are lots of activities to do here, but it's a shame we only stayed for one night, so we didn't get to explore everything. I would love to come back and stay here again if I get the chance.

Also, the stay was affordable and totally worth the price.

Myself, my children and parents had a great time camping at this park. Unfortunately the weather was terrible but that can't be helped. There was lots to do for the kids and so close to the beach. We took our dogs along and they had a great time aswell. The kids loved the bunnies jumping around everywhere. The toilets and showers were clean and there were plenty of them. The only issue we had was when we hired the ebike but that is run by an external company. Great place to stay!!!

Exceptional views from our spacious Safari tent. Loved the fireplace and bathtub on the deck with lovely views of the beach. Enjoyed every minute of our stay. The kids had fun running around on the beach and playing on the playground. Sunday morning pancakes served by Daniel to all guests were a treat. All staff were welcoming and accommodating. Such a peaceful setting and relaxing place to visit. We will certainly be back soon.
Awesome place, very central
Perfect place to stay.  Friendly and helpful.staff
Pet friendly caravan 🚐 or clamping tent tried and tested. Love this spot on the beach. So relaxing, then a stroll down the beach to Cowes main St for a coffee or dinner. Always a treat.
Nice location next from ocean and so many type to choose to stay

Great location right on the beach. Great amenities and the bathroom was actually heated! Camp kitchen was big but we didn’t use it. We were on site 66 which if all the other pitches were full we would have had great difficulty getting in and out with a campervan when going out for the day. But we didn’t use have a sea view. Also be prepared to need to put your stuff in the dyer for longer than the 40 minutes its on. Clothes were still soaking. Walking distance to the town. Very child friendly. Loads of bunnies everywhere! You have to be so careful thank god there were so many speed bumps and I was crawling along because one ran out in front of me.

Beachfront glamping at its finest, with ocean views, countless bunnies quietly roaming the park and a true country vibe that lets you connect with nature, just as I love. Cosy evenings by the fireplace made the stay even more special, and celebrating my birthday there made it truly unforgettable🥂

We absolutely loved our stay here! The staff are so helpful and accommodating and the amenities were spotless! Further to this, you can't go past the fantastic location right on the beach. Highly recommend ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Chill and nice place . Near a beach too.

My brother made the reservation for this place, and we had a great stay. The location is excellent—right on the beachfront and close to the community, making it easy to buy essentials. It’s also not far from Coles.

Staying in a tent was an exciting experience. The park has a BBQ area near the front, which I really enjoyed using to prepare both dinner and breakfast.

Great caravan park in a stunning location.

Amenities were always clean and the park was well kept.
We had 2 nights in a premium powered site. Views were incredible.
Only down side and it’s very minor was the sites are quite narrow. That said there is ample space behind the site to set up a fire pit etc.

The location couldn’t be better. Immediately on a lovely beach, and a short walk to town.

Word of warning, the place is full of rabbits. So if bringing a dog, it can be interesting as the rabbits clearly have no fear!

Otherwise would thoroughly recommend the park.

We had a dream of meeting the penguins, especially my daughter, and it was the perfect place to stay while we went to our appointment with them. A beautiful, family-friendly place with excellent, always-friendly staff. We are happy to have been there for two days. I truly recommend it 100%; my children loved running around and going to the park and the ocean. I had a problem with a tire, but a man working there helped me replace it and find a new one, despite my anxiety. Thank you NRMA Philip Island Beachfront Holiday Park for everything. Come here whenever possible and don't forget to stay in this special place.
Got 2 safari tents on the beach for the family, was amazing! Bit windy and cold, but it would be soo good in better seasons!

Great place to settle for a few days or a longer stay.Check out the whole island or relax with
the Ocean on your doorstep.
Shopping precinct 5 minutes away, restaurants, Hotels and the RSL close by.
Clean facilities and a great game room for the kids.
Cabins are nice and the ensuite sites are modern and have awesome showers.
Pet friendly.
Enjoy your stay

All perfect. I was one of those annoying client with requests and questions and couldn't read their reply for several reasons at the time. They were as professional as you can be: Great people in a great, clean, warm and comfy space ( we got a studio cabin)

We rented the studio cabin for 3 nights. It's very small but very well appointed with a kitchenette containing akettle, toaster, microwave, crockery and cutlery. The bathroom is new, spacious for such a little cabin, and very, very clean. There is an air- conditioner which is very efficient at earning the room.
A lovely space for short breaks.
Cute Safari Tents, highly recommend. Staff very helpful.

We stayed at the Safari Tent and LOVED it. It was just so cozy and well appointed. There was a kitchen-dining area (table for four, mini fridge, and microwave, but no cooking equipment), a living area, a gas fireplace, a heated canopy bed, and the cutest little elevated cubby space that fits two small beds for kids.

Having the beach and ocean right in front of the tent was incredible. If the weather had been warmer during our stay, I definitely would have spent more time on the outdoor deck, enjoying the view and the sound of the ocean and birds. Also, I don't know if this is good or bad but the whole park is...overrun with adorable cotton-tail bunnies!

Admittedly, this is a tent so the space isn't airtight and you have to be prepared for a bit of tent-flapping and shaking if it gets windy. However, the heater kept the space nice and warm. For the same reason, the place isn't sound-proof either, so you do hear outside sounds quite clearly.

One minor issue is that there is only one mirror in the cabin--in the bathroom--and it is so high up, I couldn't use it. This didn't bother me but for anyone who is short and needs the mirror, you might need to stand on a chair.

Lastly, the front desk staff were all lovely and kind and made me feel very welcome.

My husband and I stayed on a powered site with our van , it was absolutely beautiful ! Stunning ocean views , impeccable amenities , wonderful people ! We loved our stay and rebooked for another weekend there immediately ! I highly recommend this park for a relaxing peaceful getaway
We stayed 1 night at Ibis Cabin. We managed to visit Penguin Parade. Near to Coles & Woolworths. Friendly staff. Clean room and comfortable environment. Wifi worked fine.

En voyage entre Sydney et Melbourne sur trois semaines, nous avons visité de nombreux caravan parks et c’est celui qui nous laissera le moins bon souvenir : les installations étaient qualifiées de vieillottes il y a cinq ans mais n’ont pas rajeuni… la propreté était qualifiée de parfaite alors qu’en cherchant (vainement) comment brancher la couverture chauffante on a trouvé sous le lit beaucoup de moutons et même quelques dollars. Par ailleurs les cloisons sont en papier (c’était notre anniversaire de mariage 😊), nous étions trois et le deuxième lit n’était pas fait… Enfin, le Wi-Fi annoncé ne marchait quasiment pas alors qu’on était logés très près de la réception. De plus, cerise sur le gâteau, notre voisin nous a piqué notre place de parking… J’dis ça, j’dis rien.

Best experience I’ve had at a caravan park. We asked for a map of the local area anttractions and Daniel went out of his way to find one on the internet and bring it to our cabin asap The light was flickering in our bathroom, and in 5 mins Daniel was at our cabin replacing it. Never had such good service. Should be very proud. Lovely holiday!
A friendly staff. Place clean and decent. Affordable price. Recommended.

We only stayed one night at NRMA Phillip Island, as we were visiting specifically to see the Penguin Parade — and the location was ideal for that, just a short drive from the viewing area.

Our experience in the safari tent was absolutely wonderful. We truly wished we had booked a longer stay to enjoy it more. The tent is beautifully decorated, cosy, and warm — with a lovely scent that welcomes you as soon as you step inside. It felt like being wrapped in a little cocoon of comfort.

A unique and charming glamping expérience.
Great caravan park on the water

Awesome  stay. Great park close to all amenities and city centre.
Very friendly  and  helpful  staff.
Park is very clean, as were all amenities.

I stayed at the studio cabin for one night and it was great. The room was clean and full of facilities including a TV, air conditioning, heating, microwave, and kettle.

However, we had to wake up around 4:30 am due to the alarm clock from the next room. I think the walls were too thin, which is why the sound was so loud. It kept going for 5-10 minutes, which made it hard for me to ignore and go back to sleep. I thought of calling the receptionist using the after-hours number, but I felt bad about doing so because it was too early.

Stay at Nrma Philips island is great, magnificent beach view ! With location 10-15 min near attraction penguin parade & the nobbies and 5 min to Cowes town with a lot of choice of food. We recommend for all!
The cabin was ok, relatively clean. They expect you to wash, dry, and put away dishes but give you nothing to do this, no dish cloth or teatowel. The bathroom could use a bit of TLC.

Clean cabin...friendly staff.
Within walking distance to beach (about 150mts ) and within walking distance to town shops

A fantastic Park with terrific facilities.
On arrival the reception staff were fantastic. Very friendly and good for a chat.
The only negative of our stay was that our cabin is in need of lots of little things. The shower rose didn’t stay in position and was difficult to shower. Lots of laminate coming of cupboards, drawers and door frames. Minor issues but took the score down marginally. The bed was super comfortable.
We will definitely head back there and strongly recommend you give the park a go.
Mooie camping aan zee. Dicht bij het centrum van het dorp. Op rij afstand om de Penguins na zonsondergang aan land te zien komen. Hiervoor moet je wel kaarten hebben.
We have stayed here twice now for WSBK. Great loction, clean & functional rooms, amazing service and reasonable price. Highly recommend!

We had a cabin right up the back and close to the beach. Cabin's were very comfortable. Roomy. Great shower pressure.
The only thing we would suggest is some Exit signs to direct people out of the park instead of going round in circles 😏 Also why do you have to put the code in for the boom gate on your way out?? That could cause a problem in an emergency 😕

Had stayed 2 nights in Jun last year，it was great. So I booked the safari tent again recently. It was nice until the 3rd day we were going to check out. My son felt a bit warm at night，so he pulled the sheet off，which was in between the bed sheet and quilt. And we found some blood on the sheet， obviously the sheet was not completely washed. Would not recomend at all！

We have thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Phillip Island.

The amenities block was very clean and well were lucky to score a beachside view van spot!

We were on site 67 and it was quite tricky to get in to. Very quiet park.

I stayed for one night to visit family in town with my Fiancé. The location is great, and the beach is lovely for swimming. There are excellent amenities for families! I highly recommend booking the Penguin Parade.

We stayed here a few months ago caravan site, and rebooked again premium caravan site 63 it’s a perfect getaway for us although it’s a 3 hr drive it’s now our go to park for a quick getaway, be sure we will be back again
Quite peaceful location right on the beach short stroll to town, Amenities are clean and well looked after very relaxing, family and pet friendly. Can’t go wrong.😎👍👌

We have stayed here many times and been really happy.When I made a booking with Kelly very pleasant but that all changed when I rang to increase my booking days. The receptionist who was incredibly rude told me I would not have been told a site number which I was and the phone call was witnessed. I proceed to tell her I was given a number but she insisted  I wasn’t. Basically calling me a liar. I was trying to be helpful by giving her the number I was given at time of booking. Some people shouldn’t be in customer service.
I ask her to get the manager to ring me of course that didn’t happen. I previously told other people to stay at the park. Now I will be telling them only speak to Kelly or Daniel when making a booking if you want to stay there.
What a lovely park. Beach frontage, safe beach. Very clean park and amenities. Staff helpful, informative and friendly. Lots of outdoor activities for individuals, couples and family.

Lovely site and nice and clean. We had an ibis cabin and perfect for us. Cabin was clean apart from the floor which couldn't be walked on in bare feet because of sand over it. Shower was nice and hot and powerful but no plug in the bathroom sink. TV is a smart TV and perfectly fine. I left my shaving kit there but it wasn't found by the cleaner when I called to chase it up. Otherwise a very nice park right on the beach and just a short walk to town. Very good chip shop across the road.
Beautiful caravan park.  Great sites with artificial turf. Clean amenities and right on the beach.  15 minutes walk to town. Highly recommended.
A very nice stay, good location.

A truly wonderful tourist park, providing caravan, camping, cabins and glamping tents.
Good amenities, enclosed playground, electric bikes to hire and beach access.
Easy walk into Cowes township, via road or beach.
Dog friendly beach.
We stayed on an ensuite powered site. Ensuite and site beautifully maintained.
I would stay there again but the bunk beds were a bit small only good for children

Stayed in the Glamping Tents and I would definitely come back again. Amazing views of the beach, clean camp site, lots of things for the kids to. Glamping tents had ample space for a family to stay in, BBQ and a nice bathroom.
It’s very nice place 👍
Great location. Convenience to move around in the Philip Island.

Place is nice and clean.
Very close to woolworth and coles.
Bad thing is that Wifi is non existent. You can connect but there is no Internet connection

We camped in an ensuite,  powered site. Very clean. Sadly we had no shade (we booked last minute!) but apart from that it was great. Very dog friendly although we didn’t see an enclosed dog area and after January dogs are allowed off leash on the beach right at the end of the park.

I stayed here with three other people and we booked a cabin. We barely managed to get one. We got cabin 1, the cabin was very small and it was a long walk to the beach. There were dead ants in the top bunk and the air conditioner did not work properly. It was cooler outside. The internet was not that good. The beach was nice and we went for a night walk, the sunset was amazing. There are rock pools sometimes at the beach and you can find starfish and crabs on them. The fridge needs a litre while to cool things down and the freezer is a bit small. The slushies at reception are nice I recommend the sour bomb with watermelon. The couch is comfortable. The bottom bunk is pretty low to the ground and it gets really hot quickly. There are very nice staff and residents.

I’ve only booked the Safari Tent and this review isn’t about anything else at the park. It was an amazing camping experience for our family with stunning view from the beachfront tent. I liked the quick check in and out and the cleanliness of the tent. The staff were very helpful too. However, since it’s within a holiday park, it gets a bit noisy late at night. Also, the sea at Cowes isn’t that typical for surfing, It’s more suitable for young kids.

Not a huge fan of Philip Island but this park makes it worthwhile. If you can, get yourself a premium site. Wandering Panda in December offering quality coffee on your doorstep was a bonus. can definitely walk to town or a very short drive. I'll definitely be returning to the Island, just to come to this park, located right on the beach.

Need to upgrade the internet and improve connectivity.
Great family resort and atmosphere.
Nice and clean cabin.

Extremely disappointing this place, would not recommend this place at all. The reception lady was incredibly rude towards us, this lady’s behaviour was extremely disappointing and inconsiderate. We went in and got judged strait away for our age, and were informed we  couldn’t stay there even though we had gone through the entire booking process and policies multiple times. The way that this had been brought up was appalling, and were then kicked out even though we hadn’t even entered the gate. We were then told by other campsites that this lady had called them informing them to not take us as we were “disturbing everyone” and to “not let us book” even though we hadn’t even step foot into the sight?
Absolutely ridiculous behaviour and honestly that’s embarrassing.
To the reception lady, I hope that one day u can genuinely grow up, your behaviour is absolutely disgusting I hope you loose your job❤️

Highly recommend Anchorbell caravan park, literally a 2 min drive down the road, the staff there are absolutely amazing and so welcoming and were able to get us a spot strait away!

I don’t recommend this caravan park to anyone. The blonde lady at reception at around 11:50am 15/12/24, was extremely disrespectful. From the moment we walked into reception we felt extremely judged for our looks and the tone in her voice was very judgmental. We were turned down straight away due to the age of one member of our group and we were blamed for our lack of knowledge on their policy however i re-read over the documents sent to me and there was no information on what i was specifically looking for. I was also informed by another campsite that they had rung them up and complained about us. Despite the tone she gave us we continued to be nice and respectful but the reception lady failed to reciprocate that and not one nice word was said. This lady should lose her job as i’m sure they have lost many customers due to her after reading other reviews on this place. Luckily we were let in straight away by Anchor Bell caravan park down the road which i highly recommend and is 100% worth the extra 2 minutes drive. I wish i could rate this a 0.

Wish I could give this place a 0. I was extremely disappointed by the behaviour of the staff, most noticeable the reception women whom was blonde named Susie I think. I have never felt more discriminated against then at this place which is disgusting to feel when I am I paying customer. As well as this I am a Asian women so this hits hard. She was unapologetically and unreasonably rude toward me for no apparent reason. I showed nothing but respect toward her and received the utter most horrible interaction with her upon checking in. If u would love a unfriendly, uninviting and nothing but awful service come here !!!!!!

I have stayed here in an ensuite site and also in a studio cabin. The ensuite at the site was new and well maintained. The studio cabin was amazing value for money and relatively new as well. The pizza oven allowed me to create a pizza feast for the kids. Great location. Plenty of open space. Lots of grass around the campground. Direct beach access. If you’re an open water swimmer it’d be helpful to know that the beach is safe to get some distance in. For paddlers - easy access to the beach with no gates or fences to navigate. The walk to town via the beach is an easy km. Staff are friendly and helpful. I’ve stayed twice this year and are now bringing the entire family back to spend Xmas here.
Great spot to bring the kids. Clean amenities.

Un camping très calme situé au bord de la mer. Un accès direct privatif donne sur la plage depuis le camping. Tout est moderne et très bien entretenu, nous avons beaucoup apprécié notre séjour. De nombreux lapins sont présents sur place, et fuit dès que des personnes les approche
Great campsite in a fantastic location on beachfront and walling siatance to the town. All facilities clean and well maintained
A really great location, and great amenities.  We git a Ensuite van site 😀 Fabulous 👌

Loved this place great van park right on the most beautiful beach, not to mention the friendly staff in the office. The facilities are excellent , there are two toilet and shower blocks …enough for the number of guests . The park is close to town and easy walk along the beach to town or you can use the e bikes .
It’s a very nice hotel, new, clean, neat.It’s very near to the Cowes town, happening place.I’ll come again Greetings from Malaysia.
Great Park! They have pet friendly cabins! Located on the beach ( 2 minute walk from our cabin). Close to shops of needed. Above average amenities. Can’t go wrong.

We stayed in a sheerwater cabin. Cleanliness lacking.. dirty floors (took our shoes off as we entered and got black dusty socks/feet), filthy sticky dining table. Accommodation very old and run down and simple things could improve and wouldn’t be all that costly either. Quite cramped too surprisingly. Staff “customer service” not great as when we wanted to leave early after giving our reasons, there wasn’t even a simple “sorry to hear that” or anything let alone addressing our concerns. Internet is terrible and signal not great so don’t rely on that. Probably wouldn’t return for these reasons which is a shame as location is not bad and the place has potential to be great.
Thought the van sites were very cramped compared to other places we stayed

Stayed at the Sheerwater Cabin recently in Sep 2024.

Had no idea what to expect as we were looking for a simple 1-night accommodation for pre- and post-Penguin Parade. Got upgraded to Sheerwater Cabin (2 rooms) from Ibis Cabin which was awesome.

Check-in was easy at reception. However it wasn’t very clear that you had to park at reception first and not go to the boom gate directly…maybe a small sign could be placed there. Instructions were clear via the hardcopy instructions and easy to follow.

Cabin was really comfortable with a dedicated parking space in front. Air-conditioner with heating function was really strong. The second bedroom didn’t have the bedsheets set-up as I indicated that I had kids late (AU$20 extra) but the items were sealed and easy to put on.
Only issue was that I had to fiddle a little with the front netting gate as I wasn’t familiar with the locking mechanism.

Overall, this was really worth it for the price compared to a hotel! The kids really liked the cabin concept and there were cute rabbits running wild in the area as well so do be careful when driving :)

Additional: We bought dinner back from a Vietnamese restaurant (Saigon Maggie) after the Penguin Parade just a few minutes drive away from NRMA. Really lovely overall as it closed at 8.30pm and much better than eating at the Penguin Parade cafe!

We stayed at the "studio" for 3 nights in August 2024. Room was clean and the size was just ok for 2 adults. In these sorts of places, the room won't be coeaned daily nor will the towels be changed, at least not for 3 nights. The room had a microwave which was useful. The area is just outside of Cowes, with supermarkets 5 mins away by car. Overall peaceful in the studios area. We got a good price for August, so overall quite happy.

Beach Front Holiday Park was amazing!  We stayed in a studio cabin and was surprisingly impressed with it.  It was new, clean, well set out and the bathroom & shower were exceptional.  I may have even been converted to staying at caravan parks.  We will definitely be coming back.

ไปเช่าที่พักแบบเต้นมีอยู่ห้าหลังพักได้สี่คนแต่มีสิ่งอำนวยความสะดวกครบครัน เตาแก็ส ปิ้งย่างไมโครเวปช้อนจานที่เปิดไวน์แก้วครัวที่นั่งเล่นที่อาบน้ำ วิวอยู่หน้าหาดสวยมาก เป็นที่คณะของเรามาปิกนิกได้อย่างดีคุ้มค่ามาก

I stayed here for two nights to celebrate my brother's birthday and enjoy a holiday. I initially booked a safari tent and a cabin, thinking I could add an extra person to the accommodation. However, my request was refused, so I booked an additional cabin, resulting in a total of three accommodations for one night and one more night in the safari tent.

Before my brother left earlier than us, he visited my tent to say goodbye. Even though there was still time before our check-out, the staff were yelling at us to leave quickly and move his car. In the confusion, my brother accidentally used my car door code, which led to my code not working when I tried to exit (I had three different codes, which was confusing). I asked for help at the reception, but the staff were very rude, scolding me for sharing the door code.

While the space and atmosphere were pleasant, I found the service lacking. Additionally, the shower drain in the safari tent was blocked, and despite requesting a fix, it continued to drain very slowly.

The walls of the safari tent are quite thin, so try to avoid loud laughter, even if you're in a festive mood. Neighbors or staff may reprimand you for it.
1. 房間空間算大 - 佔地面積寬敞,為住客提供舒適的居住環境。2. 房間保持乾淨整潔 - 房間的清潔度良好,可以讓住客有賓至如歸的體驗。3. 使用起來很方便 - 雖然沒有前台櫃檯,但整體的入住流程與服務安排應該設計得相當便捷順暢。
Fantastic
Convenient and nice environment

Our overnight accommodation at Philip Island after we finished The Noobies.

Initially, we just wanted to book the studio, but it was not available, so we booked their tent, and it was fantastic.

Close and facing the beach and allow us to view the sunrise 🌅 before we depart the next day.

The staff got us checked in swiftly with the gate pass code, wifi password, and the park's map.

The only downside is that the canvas flapping noise during strong wind is undesirable.

Other than that everything is great 👍

Very underwhelmed with our stay. Specifically booked the Pelican cabin as it had a larger L shaped kitchen bench and 2 couches. For our family we really preferred to have the extra space which is why I booked at this site and this room. We arrived to a smaller cabin which we were unprepared for and the smaller space did impact our holiday. I brought this up with the front desk and the response received was that she had mentioned to management (?) previously that the photos online were incorrect and I should have phoned them before booking. I explained that as a customer, I felt like it was safe to presume that what was advertised and paid for, was what was received.
The park facilities were really clean, well kept and inviting. The location of the park is excellent!
The cabin appeared tidy however after spending more time in it, there was a lot of dust on top of items, old toothpaste on bathroom walls, pots and plates from previous cabin-goers were dirty, security door didnt lock, couch arm was broken and mould forming on the window sills in bunk bedroom and around the shower.
Our kids were keen to sleep in the top bunk beds but the blind chain was not attached to the wall which worried me for their safety (I believe this is a legal, safety requirement!). I raised this as we were leaving and hopefully it has been rectified.
When we arrived there were 3 lighbulbs blown. Notified front desk and they were replaced promptly however all the globes in the whole cabin/park varied between warm and cool lights. I don't quite understand why and it would look a lot more tidy/professional to put in one or the other.
Goood location
Awesome experience, facing the sea soaking in the cool breeze. Loved the privacy and cosy feeling.

I stayed here on several occasions. 1st was with my dog in a one bed cabin, could have complained about the unclean rundown cabin, but I did actually enjoyed my stay.
2nd time I stayed I took my van with dog in tow… stayed at the new ensuite site. First thing that happened was that upon using the ensuite I was locked in, I waited for the office to answer the phone and waited, finally a maintenance man heard me and managed to get me out. Turned out there was a screw left in the latch that didn’t allow the lock to release, all the other ensuites had the same issue… then on the 3rd day a group of kids on electric bikes were hammering through the park. I took my dog to the beach and saw the same kids riding on the sand and they threw their chocolate milk cartons on the sand and left. I picked them up and knew where they were and casually walked up to their onsite van and gave them back to them…
I did inform the office about this and the lady there told me they knew exactly who I was talking about as I wasn’t the first to make a complaint.
Well next day the kids decided to play football near their friends van that happened to be 20 meters from mine and set about purposely kicking the ball into my van and sending a little 5/6 year old kid to fetch the ball back. I again told the office staff. So then the building works started at the same family’s on site van, nail guns, compressors, the whole kit and kaboodle…

So move on to the 3rd time staying there thinking it can’t happen again, WRONG, this time on my second day , right next to my van building works on an onsite van began, literally first thing in the morning the radio goes on followed by the construction , it was a joke, this time I’d had enough and packed up and requested a refund. The office staff said there was nothing they could do about it, I asked for the managers number and left…
Spoke to the manager and got a refund for the days I did not stay.

Fast forward months and months later and I decided to stay in a cabin, wasn’t going to risk the van stay again…
On ringing the office to book I was told about the option of two cabins, I made my choice and gave the lady my  NRMA number, after a short while she told me there was something wrong with her computer, then she told me it had crashed and would have to ring me back, no worries I said. I received a call 20 min later and a guy saying he was the manager, who I had recognised, he then told me I was black listed from the park……in shock I ask why, he proceeded to tell me that I had abused the office staff and when leaving there park I sped off frightening the staff… ok, picture this, I leave the office and get into my car which is parked directly opposite the office, appropriately 5/6 meters in-front of my car is the exit boom gates, how much speed could I have possibly reached in this distance, I was towing a 7 meter caravan and I stopped to enter the code to operate the boom lift, directly after the boom gate is the road….
I have now started the process of a formal complaint with the ACCC , I did reach out to those involved to discuss the matter, but they have chosen not to.

I will involve a lawyer in this as they have taken my money and they have also not held there selves to caravan park standards and duty of care… they also blatantly lied about my actions, that were frankly impossible.. they obviously did not think about their accusations before speaking.

Long post, but the management of this park are failing big time in their duties.    Such a shame!
Easy to get to, clean and the most comfortable bed ever! Would highly recommend. Price was great too 👍
Great Place for families. Sheltered side of the island so calm waters most of the time. Very well maintained park with modernized amenities.

Unfortuntely on arrival our cabin smelt of cleaning products and was mouldy in mutliple locations on the bedroom ceilings. They tried to offer us another cabin but it also had mould in the bedrooms. We chose to leave and stay somewhere else.
We booked 2 double bed rooms and we love it! Tidy and clean! Rooms are warm enough with big bathrooms! The holiday park is beautiful and can access to seaside easily!

Booked the accommodation but we arrived late at 7pm due to the penguin parade. Email message was left asking me for contacts but unfortunately my network didnt work well on tat day and didnt not manage to see the email in time (overseas visitors we are). While it is not the fault of NRMA but i was disaappointed i could not reach NRMA through the number found online and it was to a recorded voicemail. No one returned the call.
I was at the front desk but it was closed and i cant find any instruction in the dark cold evening. I wasted the night and had to source for another accomnodation in this cold night. Wasnt a good experience at all.
Maybe you can improve at the frontdesk's notice and also put down in the insruction in your email to me, after all i paid for the accommodation fully already. This is what another apartments did when i checked in after 6pm when the reception desk has closed.
I cant blame the accommodation but it was really an unpleasant night for me and my family of 4.
Amazing
Clean and nice cabins. Comfy for one night stay.
Reasonable price and not too crowded as we were in the off season. I imagine it is packed otherwise. Amenities clean. A quiet location.

We booked a budget cabin (Sheerwater cabin) with a main bedroom and a bedroom with a bunk bed. A single on the top and double on the bottom. l have been to a lot of places around the world and never have l had to make up a bed on arrival. This happened here. Only the main bed was made up but l had to make up the lower berth on the bunk as it seems that they dont do it and its up to the person who booked the room to do it. The bunk is jammed in the room and you cannot lift the mattress to fit the fitted sheet. The ladder to the top bunk is attached to the bunk and cannot be undone to slide out the mattress. l understand that this is a budget cabin but to make up you own bed is too much.The other issue is that there was only 1 small pack of UHT milk in the fridge for 3 adults. l even went to the front desk to get some normal milk but was told they only had 1 left and it was UHT also. Would l go back ? Most likely not. Will l recomend the Caravan park to others ? Most likely not.
Had powered RV bay for one night.  Good facilities.
Great spot, right on the beach.

Headed to Cowes for a 3 day break.  Rang NRMA Phillip Island to see if they had a powered site for Thurs, Fri and Sat nights 23-26 May.
Was told there were no sites available for the Sat and Sun nights.
We stayed next door.
Hubby walked through on Friday and saw quite a few spare sites.
I wandered through Saturday and saw sites 106 107 108 109 110 296 297 and 2 more next to cafe. Also saw a beachside site. I’m sure there were more.
Am interested to know why you could not accomodate us.
Pic is the lovely warm camp kitchen at BeachPark Tourist park  next door

We stayed here for two nights while attending a wedding. The location is great right next to the beach although it is not a great beach on the whole for swimming due to lots of seaweed.||The cabins are tiny. There is basically no space in the bedroom to stand up so you have to get changed in the living room. The bathroom is miniscule and the shower has an icky shower curtain and a really short shower head. No way I was getting in there.|Everything is pretty dilapidated and looks like it was built decades ago and slowly just falling apart.||It is also quite annoying you can only park 1 car per cabin and you have to put a code in to drive your car in and out.

I can’t recommend this place enough! My partner and I stayed in one of their gorgeous safari tents and we were just blown away. It was spotlessly clean, in perfect condition, and very well appointed and planned out. The electric blankets were a surprisingly wonderful touch and the heater kept the tent nice and cosy. There are plenty of options to sit and relax and watch the water. It’s an easy walk into town from the park. The lady who checked us in was warm and friendly. We would love to come back and stay for more than one night next time. Thank you for a wonderful stay!

We are caravanning East Aust. Very clean park, top amenities, dog friendly, professional friendly service with coded security AND backs onto the magnificent Cowes beaches to walk etc along.
We are very impressed & highly recommend this park oh & very close to Cowes major shops, pubs etc.

We stayed at a premium beachside powered site for 4 nights, pay for 3 get the fourth free. What a great outlook we had. They allow you to have a fire here in a pit. You can buy the wood from them with firelighters and newspaper for $20 a tub and they will loan you a pit ! Great wood too! |We used it as our base and did shopping, sightseeing and lunch out by the beach.  We have a dog as well and the beach is leash free if you wish. The amenities are great, clean with good hot water. We had a wonderful stay at Phillip Island  and would recommend this beautiful park and would definitely come back here. |The staff are very friendly and helpful if you have any issues.

Many types of accommodation to choose from. My party stayed in the glamping at the beachfront. It was a superb experience with nice & neat accommodation, adequately furnished, including bbq pit and even a bathtub on the deck which gives a good view of the horizon. Nice beach for walking but the water didn’t appear clear enough for swimming. Overall nice place for a getaway with accessibility to shops a short drive away
Recently modernised, en suite caravan sites a little cramped otherwise first class.

Stayed in an ensuite powered site. The ensuite was modern, very clean, and has an amazing shower. Instant hot water. The site had fake grass which meant we didn't bring dirt into our van.
The staff were very helpful.
Very nice caravan park. Good amenity showers/toilet/camp kitchen/games room. Close to town centre and race track
Great views
This has become our regular spot such a beautiful clean place to relax
Stayed in safari tent right on the beach, great location
Excellent views and environment!

Stayed at a premium site over the school holidays. Could not have a better location - steps from a beautiful quiet beach, perfect for the kids to splash and to go standup paddle boarding. Easy bike ride into Cowes. Really enjoyed the extra activities over the holidays, especially the live music on Saturday night. We will definitely be back!!

We have an annual site. The Park is so nice a clean and tidy.  Daniel, Kelly and the team are excellent. Toilets and shower block are tidy and cleaned regularly. Great location.  So close to Cowes and shops.

wow , what a place to stay .
more importantly Daniel has tobe the most professional manager I have ever came across. other parks and venues management can take a note or too in how to run a venue and also solve problems.
talk about beachfront, easy access to beach. cabin was great for a family of 5.
highly recommended.
pancakes are awesome,  plenty of activities for kids
露營區在海邊。廁所乾淨都有空調系統。營區很多野兔子。價格也便宜。雖然海不美。但整體還算不錯。值得回訪

Being pet friendly sold me. I have a big Bull Arab cross.|Enjoyed being there. Cabin was clean and had everything we needed. |Great location, literally on the beach.|Booking the camp was easy by phone. Staff were kind and courteous . Price was reasonable as well. |All in all, a thoroughly enjoyable experience. Will return.|Highly recommended, especially if you have.a dog.
Modern well set out and maintained park. Plenty of amenities.  Loved the kitchen set out. Right on the beach, which is made for walking
Cosy cabin

This is a lovely park in a great location.  Staff are friendly and helpful and the park is clean and tidy.  If you're in a tent, like us, then be prepared to struggle with getting any pegs into the ground. It's like concrete and even our heavy duty hex pegs struggled with the ground.
The amenities are kept clean but one gripe is that they lock the disabled toilet when the toilet/shower block is closed for cleaning.  Not all of us have a loo in our set up and having the disabled toilet unlocked while the other toilets are cleaned would be handy.  One little issue to be mindful of is that you need to be super careful when you have a shower 'cos the water from the shower head soaks everything. The showers are small and the little wall between the change are and the shower itself is very narrow and doesn't protect your dry clothes very well.  Aside from those two little things the park is great and highly recommended.
We had an ensuite site and it was to nice. It looked as if near new. Suzie and all the staff were lovely. Park is well setout and great facilities. See you next time.

My wife and I plus my Service dog had 3 wonderful days at the park, with a quick enquiry the day before arrival we asked about an upgrade a were were offered a bigger cabin at a special midweek rate. We arrived and were greeted at reception by Susie who I had spoken to on the phone and was told everything about the park at all its offerings plus a fantastic Coffee caravan.
The park and cabin we had were spotless and the location to EVERYTHING was spot on.
After our stay on checking out we have re booked our next stay

If you’re looking for the perfect setting for a romantic getaway, these lux safari tents do not disappoint. Soft mood lighting, quality bedding, heating, cooling, all so clean and new. Beach views that should cost way more. Walk out directly onto pristine beach or bathe in a claw foot tub on your private deck under festoon lights. Our safari tent had everything we needed|so I can’t comment on the park other than the staff were super friendly and checkin and out was a breeze.

had an over night stay in one of the glamping tents! sure was glamping! had everything we need, tv, bathroom, kitchen, heating, cooling, utensils to use the bbq! was amazing! but as it is a “tent” for sure not sound proof, could hear people talking loud beside us all night. Besides that, amazing !

We had a fantastic stay in the Plover cabin.  The cabin was very clean and had everything we needed.

The park itself was so lovely.  Beachfront,  lots of trees,  kookaburras singing, e bikes for hire and a relaxed atmosphere.

We had a minor issue with our bike and Susie was wonderful in helping us out.  Very grateful.

It was our 1st weekend away together and we could not have picked a better place.  Hope to stay in a Glamping tent next time.  They looked amazing and right on the beach.

Highly recommend this beautiful park.
cozy accommodation and easy check-in process. Great beachfront view.
Easy to find, well appointed, close to the main shopping area. Owner very friendly. Would stay there again

Gave the park 4 weeks notice of cancellation because my farther is in hospital dying from cancer.
I had paid a $50 deposit and was informed there is a $30 "processing fee" for a refund, I will receive $20!

We had a nice stay here in the glamping tent despite some frustrations. 1 of 5, I think they have. Great amenities, had everything you could need and really homely. Weber Grill outside and views of the bay, you're literally on the beach.
There's a double bed, plus a raised sleeping area with 2 single beds in. The tent walls have windows with insect screens and flaps you can pull downs for privacy to to keep A/C in if you need.
Large deck outside with seeting for about 8, so plenty of space.
Sadly the cleanliness wasn't 100%, there was a pencil under the rug which I trod on in bare feet. Lifted up the rug to move it and there was loads of sand underneath. The sofa area was somewhat stained too.
What frustrated us more though was the way they deal with check out. It's 10am check out, which is too early in my opinion and buried deep in the 7 or 8 different Terms and Conditions documents. Not easily indentified or highlighted when booking. But they put in the documents they give you that the code to the boom gate expires at 10am, so you won't be able to exit if you're later. The cynic in me would say this is a nasty tactic to get you out. It's incredibly guest unfriendly at best and guaranteed to infuriate, and essentially means you have to vacate at about 9.40am to get car loaded/drive to exit etc.
They need 5 hours to clean in between guests but can't get that right. Not great.

One of the best parks we have stayed in.  Location beautiful, great bay to swim in, calm water with surf beach around the corner.  Caravan sites large and well maintained.  We were on site 108. Amenities spotless all the time even though the park was busy.  All staff, maintenance, cleaners and especially Kelly, in reception were wonderful, friendly and helpful.  We will be back and we want to stay much longer next time.  So much to do and see.  Just love Phillip island.
Our fav close to home holiday park. Great service & beautiful beach.

Incredible stay! The team was wonderful, the rooms were absolutely fantastic! Very clean and beautiful. There are lots of wonderful activities to do and HEAPS for kids. If you’re thinking of staying one night, stay two or three! Very much worth it. Thank you to all the team, housekeepers and staff.

Stayed in the Safari Tent which was brilliant! Very clean, felt luxurious and had everything one would need. the view of the beach is spectacular. had a slight disappointing encounter with the staff at the end of my stay as I forgot my access code in the accommodation. however very pleasant check in process. will likely to be staying again
Lovely room, clean, modern, rain shower head.
Very quiet & relaxing
Friendly caravan park mostly made up of owner occupied. Shared facilities are excellent.

Great location.  The Beach at your door step.  Beach walks and walking tracks. There is plenty to do on the island. Caravan sites with and without ensuites. New owners have been investing and improving the park and are doing a great job. Our ensuite sites are great. ✅✅✅
Good park. Revamped clean facilities. Great location
Lovely lovely place. We stayed right by the sea front.
Safari tents were fantastic. Beautiful location with beachfront views and privacy. Large covered deck with a bath tub. Just immaculate. Would return in a heart beat. 💕

Great place to stay close to the beach pittty the people at ensuite site 9 and 10 on the 8/12/23 looks like they be at it again tonight have no respect for others up parting untill well after 1.30 am keeping every body awake while park rules say no noise after 10 pm

Estuvimos muy bien la noche que nos quedamos. Estudios totalmente nuevos y limpios, correctamente equipados. Personal amable y posibilidad de aparcar en la puerta. Nos hubiésemos quedado unos días más.

Good location. Only short drive to centre of Cowes. Coles, Woolies, IGA and Aldi all represented. Caravan and Cabin park was very clean and most sites had either fake grass or green plastic mats. A lot of Rabbits are here and children were thrilled to see them. There was internet available but too poor to use. I turned wifi off and used my own data. Overall a 4 instead of a 5 because of poor internet.

Brilliant location, take the more scenic route into Cowes centre via the beach. Remember to take the pin codes with you for car boomgate and shared amenities or you'll be doing a lot of back n forth to you lodgings
Lovely clean holiday park..only thing a few dogs barking which was a bit annoying otherwise fantastic
펭귄퍼레이드 를 위한 최고의 숙소
Tidy cabins. Good for an overnighter
Found the bedrooms to small for the queen size bed. Don't get me started on the bathroom, not big enough to get dressed in. Could touch the walls with  arms bent.

All good, room was studio room seemed brand new. 2 things were annoying. The wind down blind over the front door will not last long. You want it down for pivacy but need to squeeze past to get out the door whick means folding it back, should be a curtain imo. Also they put tradies next to us so i new there would be no sleep in, yep, 6am to 720am noisy. Only problem with studio rooms. But park great location, facilites and rooms.
Schöner CP direkt am Meer in einem beschaulichen Ort

We stayed two nights in a cabin.The park was busy but quiet. The cabin was disappointing it wasn't cleaned before our arrival.
Many things were broken and needed a handyman's attention. It's also misleading for people from another state to be called a beachside caravan park.Its a lake.
My husband has a spinal cord injury and the double bed needs replacing saging in the middle.It's a lake not a beach.🏖️
Very disappointed we won't be returning. Kim
Excellent
Good place to stay.easy to get to penguins and other attractions.
Very nice place to stay
Really enjoyed our stay. Great spot. Some sites are a bit tight to get into. The amenities are fantastic and the park is beautifully maintained.  Would recommend it highly.

Always great! Such a beautiful park right on the beach. Very clean and the staff are always friendly and welcoming. As a single traveler I really appreciate the location as l can walk to the shops and feel secure too. I know Daniel and the team really care about their guests. I have stayed in the cabins a few times now. The park attracts lovely families. You can also walk straight onto the beach!
We were able to walk down to the beach which was nice

This beautiful vacation spot is in a fantastic location, just a short walk from the beach and surrounded by lush greenery. The rooms are spacious, very clean, and well-organized. I highly recommend it!

A great place to stay for families. They have everything you need, laundry, kitchen, even a games room for the kids. Situated right beside the beach so you can go for a walk and take in the beautiful scenery. Highly recommend!

It is a wonderful experience for me, because the place was cozy, the amenities are good and the room has great value for its accomodation price. It is the perfect place to unwind, rest and relax, and walk on the beach. Will definitely come back again to this place!

We had an ensuite site with a beautiful modern bathroom, clean grounds, close to facilities and shopping areas.
Only a short drive to the Penguin Parade, Nobbies Centre and the Koala Sanctuary.
Couldn’t be closer to the water

Stayed in a studio. It had been recently renovated and was modern, clean and comfortable. The rain shower was amazing! Inspiring any house renovations I do in the near future. Location was close to the beach, I was able to make a coffee in my room and catch the morning sunrise. Cost was very affordable. Only negative was the wifi was spoty, but aside from that this was an excellent stay. Will be back
Great park with beautiful views. Great amenities. Staff very helpful, I would highly recommend. Thanks
Beautiful location and roomy cabins, close to shops and amenities  and absolute water front views.
Great park and good prices. Facilities are great and very modern. Would definitely stay again!

Great place to stay, right on the beach. I stayed in the new studio apartments and they are extremely comfy and very well appointed, bed was amazingly comfy too. The staff were grrata g check in and out.
Great place to stay if you wanna explore the island
Fantastic Location, Great Park with Beach frontage What more could you want
Perfect studio cabin for the night. Comfy bed, perfect shower and pleasant reception staff. Apart from the weather it was a lovely stay. Will be back when it is warmer.
Great for all the family and friends
Best park on the island by a mile
Great place for a short holiday. Lovely beach. Great amenities
Lovely  park very freindly staff and understanding our needs
Great beachfront holiday spot with large caravan spots
We stayed at this park on the weekend, great location on Phillip Island. New clean facilities and staff were fantastic. Highly recommend.
